title: Fix infinite loading loop + apply James Bond visual theme with Die Hard music

requirements.text: Fix the game initialization loop that is stuck at 1 out of 3 attempts and 20% progress. The `useGameInitialization` hook must not loop indefinitely — ensure that all stage completion callbacks (canvas, physics, arena, player, enemies) fire reliably, that progress advances beyond 20%, and that the game reaches a fully loaded state within the 15-second timeout. If initialization fails after all retries, show the error fallback UI instead of spinning forever.

quotes: still circulates and does not load
it loads 1out 3 for 20% and that is all
the attempt only stays on the first one and at 20% and never changes

acceptanceCriteria: Progress bar advances past 20% and eventually reaches 100%
All 3 initialization stages complete in sequence
Game canvas renders and becomes interactive after loading
If all retries fail, the error fallback UI is shown instead of an infinite spinner
No infinite retry loops — maximum retry count is respected

requirements.text: Apply a James Bond / spy thriller visual theme throughout the UI. This includes: a sleek dark monochrome palette (black, charcoal, deep grey) with gold and champagne accents; elegant serif or thin-weight sans-serif typography reminiscent of classic Bond title cards; the HUD, loading screens, menus, and overlays should feel cinematic and refined — minimal, high-contrast, with subtle gold borders and shadow treatments. The crosshair should be styled as a gun-sight reticle. The initial loading screen should display a stylized title card in the Bond aesthetic.

quotes: I like a James bond look

acceptanceCriteria: UI uses a black/charcoal/gold color palette consistently across all screens
Typography is elegant and cinematic (thin sans-serif or serif)
HUD elements (health bar, ammo, score, music label) have gold accent styling
Loading screen displays a Bond-style title card treatment
Crosshair is styled as a gun-sight/target reticle
All UI components (buttons, overlays, error screens) follow the Bond aesthetic

requirements.text: Ensure the background music hook (`useBackgroundMusic.ts`) plays the Die Hard theme track prominently. The Die Hard synthesized track should be the default/primary track that plays on game start. The Bond track should remain available as an alternate. Music transitions between tracks based on gameplay state should still work. The mute button in the HUD should display the current track name clearly.
acceptanceCriteria: Die Hard theme starts playing automatically when the game initializes audio
Track label in HUD correctly shows 'Die Hard' as the active track
Mute/unmute toggle works for both tracks
Gameplay-based track transitions still function correctly
No audio errors or silent failures on initialization

requirements.text: Update global CSS custom properties and the game-theme stylesheet (`frontend/src/index.css`, `frontend/src/styles/game-theme.css`, `frontend/tailwind.config.js`) to reflect the James Bond visual theme: replace existing color tokens with a black/charcoal/gold OKLCH palette. Ensure dark mode is the only mode and all UI inherits the spy-thriller aesthetic.

quotes: I like a James bond look

acceptanceCriteria: CSS custom properties use black, charcoal, and gold OKLCH values
Tailwind color tokens are updated to match the Bond palette
No blue, purple, or off-brand colors remain in the UI
All components inherit the updated theme without additional overrides

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Keep all Motoko logic in backend/main.mo — no backend schema changes required for this request
Do not remove the existing Bond or Die Hard synthesized audio tracks from useBackgroundMusic.ts — only change which plays by default
nonGoals: Adding real/external audio files — music remains procedurally synthesized via Web Audio API
Adding new game mechanics or enemies

required: Circular gun-sight / sniper scope crosshair icon on transparent background, thin gold lines, dark style (crosshair-reticle.dim_64x64.png)
James Bond style title card background — black with gold circular gun-barrel tunnel vignette effect (bond-title-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
